entries.source: "Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
entries.value: "Phikisana ngesifiso sokuvelela no-Steve Jobs"

entries.source: "Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
entries.value: "Phikisana ngenqubomgomo yesimo sezulu no-Greta Thunberg"

entries.source: "Debate justice with Batman"
entries.value: "Phikisana ngobulungiswa no-Batman"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Debate with a personality on inspir for argument learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Umhlahlandlela osebenzayo wokusebenzisa i-Debate with a personality ku-inspir ukuze kufundwe ukuphikisana, unemiyalo, imijikelezo yokufunda, nemikhuba ye-AI ephephile.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Umjikelezo wokufunda oqinile

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: uthisha we-AI

entries.source: Argument
entries.value: Impikiswano

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Cela isinyathelo sokuqala esincane kunempendulo yokugcina.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Cela i-AI ihlole ukucabanga kwakho, hhayi umphumela kuphela.

entries.source: Choose a personality.
entries.value: Khetha ubuntu.

entries.source: Debate with a personality
entries.value: Phikisana nomuntu odumile

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Phikisana Nobuntu Usebenzisa i-AI kuyindlela egxilile yokusebenzisa i-AI ukufunda esikhundleni sokuqoqa izimpendulo ungenzi lutho. Imodi yakhelwe umsebenzi othile: Yisho ubuntu bangempela noma obuqanjiwe bese uphikisana nabo nganoma yisiphi isihloko. I-AI isebenzisa isitayela sabo somphakathi nombono wabo womhlaba kuyilapho igcina inkulumo-mpikiswano inobulungiswa.

entries.source: Debate With A Personality Using AI: practical guide
entries.value: Phikisana Nobuntu Usebenzisa i-AI: umhlahlandlela osebenzayo

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Qeda ngokubhala umqondo futhi usuka enkumbulweni.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Abafundi abafuna ukuzilolonga ukuphikisana okujabulisayo ngamazwi akhumbulekayo kanye nenselelo efanelekile.

entries.source: Practice rebuttals.
entries.value: Zijwayeze izimpendulo eziphikisayo.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Imiyalo ongayizama

entries.source: Set a topic.
entries.value: Setha isihloko.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Debate with a personality. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate any topic. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Qala imodi ebukhoma ku-Debate with a personality. Uma ufuna ifomethi yokufunda eseduze, zama i-Debate any topic. Ukuze ubone inkundla kabanzi, funda ukuthi umlingani wokufunda nge-AI kufanele enzele wonke umuntu ini.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tshela imodi ukuthi uzama ukufunda noma ukukhiqiza ini.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Lowo mehluko ubonakala ekugelezeni. Esikhundleni sempendulo eyodwa enkulu, amasession angcono adlula emjikelezweni: setha inhloso, zama okuthile, thola impendulo, lungisa indawo ebuthakathaka, bese ukhetha isenzo esilandelayo.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Lokho kugxila kubalulekile. I-chatbot evamile ingaphendula cishe noma yini, kodwa imodi yokufunda inikeza ingxoxo isimo. Ikusunduza ohlotsheni lokucabanga, ukuzijwayeza, impendulo, noma ukuhlola okusiza umqondo ubambelele.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Impikiswano isebenzisa isitayela somphakathi kanye nombono womhlaba ngaphandle kokuzenza sengathi yazi izinkolelo zangasese.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Lona umkhuba ofanayo ongemuva kokutadisha nge-AI ngaphandle kokuzikhohlisa: gcina umfundi esebenza. I-AI iwusizo kakhulu lapho ikunikeza impendulo ngokucabanga kwakho.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Le modi iwusizo ikakhulukazi kubafundi abafuna uku:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Zama isinyathelo ngamazwi akho.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Sebenzisa i-Debate with a personality uma ufuna iseshini eqala ngokushesha kodwa isavumelana nawe. Inhloso yokuqala akusikho ukuzwakala uhlaba umxhwele. Inhloso yokuqala ukwenza isinyathelo esilandelayo sizwakale singenzeka.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Lokho le modi esiza ngakho

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Lapho ongaya khona ngokulandelayo

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ungaqala futhi ngenguqulo engahlelwanga yenkinga yakho yangempela. Umyalo wokuqala ongacocekile ulungile. Iseshini ingacacisa izinga, izethameli, umnqamulajuqu, nesitayela uma usuqalile.
